name: Array Technologies, Inc.
description: Array Technologies, Inc. is a leading American company specializing in the design and manufacture of solar tracking systems used in utility-scale solar energy projects. Headquartered in Albuquerque, New Mexico, the company provides advanced tracker solutions that optimize the orientation of solar panels toward the sun throughout the day, significantly increasing energy production compared to fixed-tilt systems. Array's flagship DuraTrack and OmniTrack products are engineered for durability and efficiency in diverse environmental conditions, supporting the global transition to renewable energy through innovative engineering and domestic manufacturing capabilities.
